name: bymax-quality
description: Quality gates and review tooling for TypeScript and Rust: /bymax-quality:code-review (deterministic mechanical gate + bug hunt with adversarial verification, modes quick/full/deep, CRITICAL→LOW severity, blocks on CRITICAL/HIGH), /bymax-quality:review-md (generates a repo REVIEW.md so Anthropic's cloud Code Review enforces the same rules), /bymax-quality:tdd (red-green-refactor), multi-stack tester skill, seven specialist sub-agents, and pre/post hooks (secret-scanner blocks credential commits, console-log-scan warns on stale logs).
